options.content: Ethereum Arbitrum Base BNB Hyperliquid Monad Solana TON
Global US West EU Asia

#### Description

This dashboard provides real-time and historical performance analytics for RPC nodes across major providers.

* Click region buttons to view metrics from different locations
* Adjust time range for historical analysis
* Hover over info icons for detailed metric descriptions

 

#### Data collection

Response times are measured by our Python service on [Vercel serverless functions](https://github.com/chainstacklabs/compare-dashboard-functions), sending requests every 1-3 minutes from three regions.

Response times exceeding 55 seconds are considered failures and excluded from charts.

All requests use latest blocks except "archive" methods (⌛), which query historical blocks (1-2 days ago).

ℹ️ If not specified, the first paid RPC provider plan (named Growth as a rule) is used for monitoring.

 

#### How we rank providers

We evaluate RPC providers based on their **speed** (response time) and **reliability** (success rate) across three regions.

* The **lower** the score, the **better** the provider
* Even small success rate drops (99% vs 97%) significantly impact the final score
* Performance is measured equally across all regions

```plaintext
Score = 1 / ((1/ResponseTime) × (SuccessRate³))
```

panels.description:
We evaluate RPC providers based on their speed (response time) and reliability (success rate) across three regions.

Score = 1 / ((1/ResponseTime) × (SuccessRate³))
panels.title: Provider score (lower is better)
What is the average response time and overall success rate?

panels.description: Average response time across all metrics per provider, segmented by request origin region.
panels.title: By data collection region

panels.description: Success rate of requests where response has 200 status code and contains no error field in JSON RPC response.

targets.expr:
sum(count_over_time((response_latency_seconds{blockchain="Base", response_status="success", source_region=~"fra1|sfo1|hnd1"} >= 0)[$__range:$__interval])) by (provider, source_region)
/
sum(count_over_time((response_latency_seconds{blockchain="Base", source_region=~"fra1|sfo1|hnd1"} >= 0)[$__range:$__interval])) by (provider, source_region)

panels.title: Success rate

panels.description: Average response time per API method for each provider, aggregated across all regions. Block timestamp delay in eth_subscribe("newHeads")  represents the difference between block timestamp and its reception time.
panels.title: By API method
What is the average response time in each region?

panels.description: Average response time per provider-region pair, showing response times between each collection location and provider endpoint.
Average response time per provider-region pair, showing response times between each collection location and provider endpoint.
Average response time per provider-region pair, showing response times between each collection location and provider endpoint.
Historical response time per provider-region pair, showing trends in eth_call requests.

targets.expr: sum by (provider, source_region) (response_latency_seconds{blockchain="Base", api_method="eth_call", response_status="success"})

panels.title: eth_call

panels.description: Success rate of requests where response has 200 status code and contains no error field in JSON RPC response.

targets.expr:
sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{blockchain="Base", api_method="eth_call", response_status="success"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)
/
sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{blockchain="Base", api_method="eth_call"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)

panels.title: Success rate
